description:
**Milestone:** Local Semantic Embeddings

Implement hybrid search in KnowledgeStoreService.search() that combines FTS5 BM25 scores with cosine similarity scores using Reciprocal Rank Fusion (RRF). When embeddings are available for the query and stored chunks: (1) Run FTS5 BM25 search to get top-50 candidates with scores, (2) Embed the query via EmbeddingService, (3) Load embeddings for those 50 candidates from SQLite, (4) Compute cosine similarity for each, (5) RRF merge: rrf_score = 1/(k + bm25_rank) + 1/(k + cosine_rank) where k=60, (6) Return top-K by RRF score. If EmbeddingService not ready or embeddings not computed yet, fall back to pure BM25. Add hybridRetrieval: boolean to KnowledgeStoreSettings (default: true) and to the settings schema in @automaker/types. Add enabledHybridRetrieval field to KnowledgeStoreStats so UI can show retrieval mode. Update /api/knowledge/search route to return retrieval_mode: 'hybrid' | 'bm25' in response.

**Files to Modify:**
- apps/server/src/services/knowledge-store-service.ts
- apps/server/src/services/embedding-service.ts
- libs/types/src/knowledge.ts
- apps/server/src/routes/knowledge/routes/search.ts

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Hybrid retrieval uses RRF merge of BM25 rank + cosine rank
- [ ] Graceful fallback to BM25-only when embeddings unavailable
- [ ] hybridRetrieval setting toggles behavior
- [ ] retrieval_mode field in search response indicates active mode
- [ ] Hybrid mode improves recall for conceptually related but keyword-different queries
- [ ] npm run build:server && npm run test:server passes

**Complexity:** medium
title: Hybrid BM25 + Semantic Retrieval with RRF
